rationale: Educ. Code §39.363 concerns agency website posting of school performance and financial accountability ratings. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts or property tax appraised value.
quote: Sec. 39.363. NOTICE ON AGENCY WEBSITE. Not later than October 1 of each year, the agency shall make the following information available to the public on the agency's Internet website:
_note: No conflict. Rule addresses school performance rating publication, unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption.
